items.claim: Bautista lands 5.3 significant strikes per minute.
Sanhagen lands 4.9 significant strikes per minute.
Sanhagen has a 56% takedown defense rate.
Bautista is capable of competing with Sanhagen on the feet.
items.quote: Baltisa is going to be able to hang on the feet.

items.claim: Bautista has multiple paths to victory including grappling if striking fails.
items.quote: He might potentially take the fight to the ground if it's not going well there. He's got multiple options.

items.claim: Saint Deni lands approximately 1.5 takedowns per round.
items.quote: Saint Deni who lands like a takedown and a half per round.

items.claim: Pimblett has a poor 44% takedown defense rate.
Pimblett is vulnerable to being controlled on the ground.
items.quote: if he gets to the ground, he could potentially be controlled there.

items.claim: Holloway lands nearly 7 significant strikes per minute.
items.quote: Holloway nearly seven significant strikes per minute.

items.claim: McGregor lands 5.3 significant strikes per minute.
Holloway has an 81% takedown defense rate.
The fight between McGregor and Holloway is likely to remain a striking match.
items.quote: it's very likely this fight stays standing.
